---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what use case does it enable? Who would benefit?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed. Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about, and why this one is better.

## Additional Context

Mockups, references to similar apps, or any other context that helps explain the request.
